title: Repository Structure — Structure Markdown
description: Agent-readable markdown summary rendered from inventory + constitution. Written by slopbrick to .slopbrick/structure.md. Read by the slop_suggest_with_structure MCP tool for a 100-1000× fast path that avoids re-parsing AST. Future tools (stackpick, gir) will read the same artifact for similar speedups.

structure.md is not structured JSON — it's a markdown file. This schema describes the section structure that renderers MUST emit and readers MUST tolerate. The actual content of each section is free-form markdown.

frontmatter.description: YAML frontmatter at the top of structure.md. Machine-parseable metadata about the rendered summary.

schemaVersion.description: structure.md format version. Currently '3' (bumped in v0.15.0 rebrand from memory.md → structure.md).

inventoryVersion.description: Schema version of the inventory this structure.md was rendered from.

constitutionVersion.description: Schema version of the constitution this structure.md was rendered from.

sections.description: Ordered sections in structure.md. Renderers MUST emit sections in this order. Readers MUST tolerate missing optional sections.
